ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sales" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the genres table */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the publishers table */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the platforms table */,
  "north_america_sales" REAL /* Sales in North America */,
  "europe_sales" REAL /* Sales in Europe */,
  "japan_sales" REAL /* Sales in Japan */,
  "rest_of_world_sales" REAL /* Sales in the Rest of the World */,
  "global_sales" REAL /* Total global sales */,
  "rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was last updated */,
  "is_dlc" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the game is a DLC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company that developed the platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the platform was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the genres table */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the platforms table */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., 'Yearly', 'Quarterly') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_share" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market share entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the market share */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the publishers table */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the publisher */,
  "market_share_percentage" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id")
)

Foreign key to the publishers table
Foreign key to the platforms table
